items.title: Oracle reports Q3 revenue up 22% YoY to $17.19B, vs. $16.91B est., and cloud revenue up 44% to $8.9B, vs. $8.85B est.; ORCL jumps 6%+ after hours (Jordan Novet/CNBC)
items.title_en: Oracle reports Q3 revenue up 22% YoY to $17.19B, vs. $16.91B est., and cloud revenue up 44% to $8.9B, vs. $8.85B est.; ORCL jumps 6%+ after hours (Jordan Novet/CNBC)
items.title_zh: 甲骨文报告第三季度收入同比增长 22% 至 $17.19B，预期为 $16.91B，云收入增长 44% 至 $8.9B，预期为 $8.85B； ORCL 盘后上涨 6% 以上（Jordan Novet/CNBC）
